description:
Parent epic: V3 E5: Controls and human in the loop

Source task 1/9 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Design final V3 `controls do ... end` syntax.

Epic closure criteria:
- Controls are the one public policy concept
- human-in-the-loop is demonstrated without new runtime machinery
- raising controls cannot crash the agent process

comments.text: Finalized the V3 controls syntax at the DSL entity layer: controls now compile into InputControl, OperationControl, and ResultControl entities with a  argument, and operation controls support the simple  match syntax.

title: E5: Design final V3 controls do ... end syntax
